## Summary

What changed and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check:file-size`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `cd apps/desktop && bun run build` when app/runtime behavior changed

## Screenshots / videos

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, API keys, or private data committed
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior/architecture changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for meaningful behavior changes
- [ ] Changes are focused and avoid unrelated refactors
